name: Life — Nature Documentary fMRI (Hyperalignment)
description: fMRI from 18 participants watching the BBC 'Life' nature documentary, shared via DataLad. A naturalistic dataset for hyperalignment and modeling of dynamic audiovisual representation.
citation: Van Uden CE, et al. (2018). Modeling semantic encoding in a common neural representational space. Frontiers in Neuroscience, 12, 437.
